title: Wife of MFM Over-seer,The Niche MD,Grandma Foods brand wins Award
description: The wife of Mountain Fire Ministry founder,Pastor Shade  Olukoya,the Managing Director of The Niche Newspaper,Mr Okechukwu Amaechi and the Grandma FoodS brand among others over the weekend were honour
html:
The wife of Mountain Fire Ministry founder,Pastor Shade  Olukoya,the Managing Director of The Niche Newspaper,Mr Okechukwu Amaechi and the Grandma FoodS brand among others over the weekend were honoured with the Eminence Global News Magazine awards of excellence.
Speaking at the event which held at the LCCI exhibition hall CBD,Alausa -Ikeja,Lagos Mr Amaechi said  the failure of two Nigerian Information Ministers,namely late Dora AkunyIli and Alhaji Lai Mohammed  to rebrand Nigeria shows that the much hyped brand Nigerian  is non-existent.Said he “Am afraid there is no brand Nigeria.What are you promoting as brand Nigeria?What are you sustaining as brand Nigeria?”
According to him the failure of Nigeria to develop a great brand is due to lack of  credible leadership needed to guide or drive the process,saying other nations of the world that even have less potentials than Nigeria have successfully built great brands for themselves in the comity of nations.
Contributing her own perception on the issue of branding the CEO of Grandma Foods,Udo Stephanie Akwara stated that its imperative for a business to build a strong brand if it aims to be successful at the market place,adding however that branding for her should go with excellence of products and services-it should not just be based on packaging.
Akwara who was represented at the event by Kayode Emmanuel maintained that the fact that Grandma Foods are certified by well regarded organisations in America and Europe showcases the fact that their products are good and amenable  at the market place.
She called on other SME’s to toe the line of excellence in their operations,saying that branding is good if the product and services equally meets needed standard.
Going further, Amaechi asked those extolling Nigeria as the giant of Africa is not helping the country to do what needs to be done to merit such appellation,saying that the nation needs to walk the talk and avoid mediocrity in order to achieve respect as a great brand.
